node.statement: (Commutant Decomposition and Multiplicity Bound). Under the hypotheses of the Main Dimension Bound (Node 1.3), if dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) < ∞, then the commutant π_φ(A)' is a finite-dimensional von Neumann algebra, hence by Artin-Wedderburn π_φ(A)' ≅ ⊕_{j=1}^k M_{n_j}(C) for pairwise inequivalent irreducible summands σ_j with multiplicities n_j. Therefore dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) = Σ_{j=1}^k n_j², and the bound becomes Σ_{j=1}^k n_j² ≤ m + 1.
